name: Doc/Image Parser — Google Drive to Claude OCR to Slack
description: Fetches files from Google Drive, uses Claude AI to extract text and structured data from documents and images (OCR), then posts the extracted results to Slack with Block Kit formatting.

source.originalName: Parse and Extract Data from Documents/Images with Mistral OCR

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post extracted data

driveQuery.description: Google Drive search query to find files (e.g. name contains 'invoice')

maxFiles.description: Maximum number of files to process

extractionGoal.default: Extract all text, tables, key data points, and structured information from the document or image
extractionGoal.description: What to extract from the documents/images

steps.name: List files from Google Drive matching query
Parse file list and prepare for processing
Build Claude extraction prompt with file metadata
Run Claude AI to analyze documents
Parse Claude output and strip code fences
Build Slack Block Kit message with extraction results
